items.title: Redeploying Fable 5
items.original_summary: Fable 5 returns globally July 1. We're also proposing an industry-wide framework for scoring jailbreak severity, together with Amazon, Microsoft, Google, and other Glasswing partners.
items.chinese_summary: 跟进报道：Anthropic 宣布 Fable 5 于 7 月 1 日全球恢复可用，并联合 Amazon、Microsoft、Google 等 Glasswing 伙伴提出业内 jailbreak 严重度评分框架。相对此前 Fable 5 受美国政府指令暂停的状态属于服务恢复，评分框架为提议阶段尚不涉及 API 字段。已接入 Fable 5 的系统无需迁移，但仍需关注灰度恢复期间限流。
items.backend_focus: 建议：当前依赖 Fable 5 的服务可恢复生产流量；关注 Anthropic 后续是否对 Fable 5 API endpoint 加 jailbreak 严重度相关安全头或审计字段，暂无需改动 SDK 版本。

items.title: Introducing Claude Sonnet 5 Sonnet 5 delivers frontier performance across coding, agents, and professional work at scale.
items.original_summary: Announcements  Claude Science, an AI workbench for scientists, is now available Claude Science is a customizable app that integrates the tools and packages researchers most often use, produces auditable artifacts, and provides flexible access to computing resources. Product  Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharin...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布 Claude Sonnet 5，主打编码、Agent 与规模化专业工作能力，同期附带 Claude Science 科研工作台、Claude Tag 协作工具及 AI 政策提案。Sonnet 5 相对 Sonnet 4.x 为新主力模型版本，建议优先在新项目与高负载任务中评估。已有 Sonnet 4 系列调用代码无需立即迁移，但要关注 Sonnet 5 是否引入新 tool_use 字段或 context window 调整。
items.backend_focus: 建议：将 model 字段切换为 claude-sonnet-5 跑 A/B 对照；查阅 Sonnet 5 changelog 确认 max_tokens、context window、tool_use schema 是否有变化，再决定旧版本下线时间点。

items.title: Claude Science, an AI workbench for scientists, is now available Claude Science is a customizable app that integrates the tools and packages researchers most of
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Sonnet 5 Sonnet 5 delivers frontier performance across coding, agents, and professional work at scale. Announcements  ten use, produces auditable artifacts, and provides flexible access to computing resources. Product  Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our inst...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 推出 Claude Science，面向科研场景的可定制 AI 工作台，集成常用工具/包并产出可审计产物、支持灵活算力调用。相对此前仅提供裸模型 API，Science 增加了科研模板与算力调度抽象层；这是面向科学家的高层产品而非新增 API endpoint。已有 Claude API 调用方不受影响，科研团队可单独订阅。
items.backend_focus: 可选行动：科研类业务可申请 Claude Science 试用评估审计产物格式；通用 API 接入方无需改动 model、messages 或 tools 字段。

items.title: Statement on the US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
items.chinese_summary: 跟进报道：Anthropic 就美国政府指令暂停 Fable 5 与 Mythos 5 访问发布声明，确认已按 hard-stop 切断相关访问权限。这是对先前监管事件的执行确认，已接入 Fable 5/Mythos 5 的服务必须立即移除调用，否则会收到 hard error。对 Claude 系列其他模型无影响。
items.backend_focus: 强制行动：立即从代码与配置中删除所有指向 fable-5、mythos-5 模型 ID 的调用与路由；检查 fallback 链是否仍隐式引用，必要时切换到 claude-sonnet-5 或 claude-opus-5 系列。
